'''''Viper''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was presumably attempting to destroy the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] under the command of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to stop a salvage attempt during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. It was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
